name: Heritage Oaks Golf Club
about: Heritage Oaks Golf Club is a public facility managed by the Northbrook Park District. It features multiple playing options, including an 18-hole Classic Course, a 9-hole Legacy Course, an Anetsberger Par-3 course, and indoor golf simulators. The venue is equipped with a TrackMan range, putting green, and short game area, providing comprehensive practice facilities. It also hosts corporate events, leagues, and offers instruction through the Northbrook Golf Academy. The Acorn Grill + Terrace restaurant is currently closed for improvements but is normally available for dining.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium TrackMan technology for advanced practice and simulation
Variety of course options from full 18 holes to a Par 3
Comprehensive practice amenities including a short game area and putting green
Junior and adult instructional programs available through the Northbrook Golf Academy

food_and_drink.notes: Acorn Grill + Terrace is temporarily closed for improvements (Feb 5-9). Restaurant typically offers full service.
Acorn Grill + Terrace is temporarily closed for improvements. Availability of alcohol in normal operations is not specified.

simulator_hardware.notes: Integrated into the TrackMan Range and indoor simulator bays for launch monitor data

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You do not need to bring your own clubs to use the indoor golf simulators or practice facilities. Club rentals and professional club fittings are available services at the venue.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The Acorn Grill + Terrace restaurant is currently closed, but it typically serves food and drinks. BYOB policies are not explicitly mentioned on the website.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes on a simulator?
faq.answer: While the exact duration is not specified, a typical 18-hole simulator session generally takes 1-2 hours, depending on the number of players in your group.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Heritage Oaks Golf Club is kid-friendly. It offers a dedicated Par-3 course (Anetsberger) and has a specific focus on youth programs through its Northbrook Golf Academy.
